solution: ```class Solution {
public:
    bool hasAlternatingBits(int n) {
        int x = n ^ (n >> 1);
        return (x & (x + 1)) == 0;
    }
};```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses bitwise XOR and AND operations to check alternating bits. The XOR between n and n>>1 produces a bitmask where consecutive identical bits become 0. Adding 1 to this mask and AND-ing with original mask reveals if all bits were alternating.
